_comment: en.json — English. Keys mirror pt.json exactly — same key = same UI location.

shop.tagline: Sustainable fashion that respects the planet. Timeless designs for our future.
product.shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
product.shipping.desc: Delivery in Mainland Portugal in 2-3 business days. We accept returns within 14 days of receiving the order.
cart.empty.title: Your cart is empty
cart.empty.desc: Add some products to your collection and they will appear here.
cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.clearConfirm.title: Clear Cart?
cart.clearConfirm.desc: Are you sure you want to remove all items from the cart? This action cannot be undone.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our recycled clothing or need help with your order? We are here to help!
contact.info.title: Contact Information
contact.form.title: Send us a Message
contact.form.success.title: Message Sent!
contact.form.success.desc: Thank you for your message. We will reply as soon as possible.
contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.form.errors.name: Please enter your name.
contact.form.errors.subject: Please select a subject.
contact.faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions from our customers
contact.faq.a1: Yes! All our pieces are recycled, second-hand or upcycled. Each item is carefully selected and verified to ensure quality and authenticity.
contact.faq.q2: Do you deliver across the entire European Union?
contact.faq.a2: Yes! We deliver to all EU countries. Shipping to mainland Portugal and the islands has reduced costs.
contact.faq.a3: You have 14 days to return any item. Pieces must be in the same condition as received. Please see our returns policy for full details.
favorites.title: My Favourites
favorites.empty.title: No favourites yet
favorites.empty.desc: Browse our shop and add products to your favourites list to find them easily later.
checkout.success.title: Payment Completed Successfully!
checkout.success.desc: Your payment has been processed successfully and your order is confirmed.
checkout.success.step2: You will receive a confirmation email shortly
checkout.success.step3: Your order will be processed in the next few hours
checkout.success.loginRequired: To view your order history you need an account and must be logged in.
checkout.fail.title: Payment Not Completed
checkout.fail.desc: Your payment was not processed. This may have happened for several reasons:
checkout.fail.orderNote: Your order was created but not paid. You can try to pay again in your orders or create a new order.
trackOrder.status.shippedDesc: Your order is on its way
verifyEmail.loading.title: Verifying email...
verifyEmail.loading.desc: Please wait while we verify your email.
verifyEmail.success.title: Email Verified Successfully!
verifyEmail.success.desc: Your account is now active and you can access all Recicloth features.
verifyEmail.error.title: Verification Error
verifyEmail.error.cause1: The verification link has expired (valid for 1 hour)
verifyEmail.error.cause2: The email has already been verified
verifyEmail.error.cause3: The link is incorrect or has been altered
auth.verifyEmailFirst: Please verify your email before logging in
